title: opus-harness project config
description: Consumer contract: JSON Schema defaults are NOT auto-applied. /calibrate must write a COMPLETE config (all optional fields with their default values). Hook scripts must still null-coalesce when reading (e.g. missing voting.ratchetLimit -> 2).

testQuick.description: Fast scoped test run. If absent, stop-gate hook falls back to commands.test; if both absent, hook warns and fail-opens.

protectedBranches.description: Release branches only a HUMAN may merge into. The repo default branch is ALWAYS implicitly protected even if omitted here; agents may EXTEND this list but never shrink it (constraints.md: human-merge-gate). Effective protected set = this list UNION existing main/master UNION resolvable origin/HEAD; if the whole git section is missing, treat as that full conservative set.

integrationBranch.description: Explicit override for where stage merges land. MUST NOT be a protected branch -- on conflict treat as unset and escalate. Empty = derive from the cycle's starting branch (protected start -> short-lived feature branch + final PR; non-protected start -> that branch is the integration target).

panelSize.description: Reserved, not consumed yet: panel composition follows review.dimensions (one reviewer per dimension).
